source.title: Meta Ad Library + Google Ads Transparency Center — Temu Ad Spend Analysis

extractions.claim: Temu reduced US advertising spend by ~97% from 2023 to 2025 based on Meta Ad Library data
extractions.evidence: Meta Ad Library (US): Baseline 2023: 10,000+ active ads; Current 2025: ~300 active ads. Change: -97% US ad reduction. Google Ads Transparency Center confirms: 2023-2024 heavy advertising across YouTube, Search, Display; 2025 significant reduction in US-targeted campaigns.

verification.verifier_notes: Data from Meta Ad Library API and Google Ads Transparency Center scripts. Both platforms independently confirm the dramatic US ad reduction.

extractions.claim: Temu shifted advertising focus from US to European markets in 2025
extractions.evidence: Meta Ad Library: Shifted focus to European markets. Google Ads Transparency: Increased targeting of UK, Germany, France markets. Dramatic shift from US to European markets in 2025.

verification.verifier_notes: Both Meta and Google ad transparency tools confirm geographic reallocation

extractions.claim: Temu's US Google Shopping ad impressions fell from 19% share to 0% after tariff changes
extractions.evidence: Temu, a significant Super Bowl advertiser in 2024, drastically cut ad spending following the tariffs and de minimis policy changes, with their U.S. Google Shopping ad impressions falling from 19% to 0% in a short period.

verification.verifier_notes: From Modern Retail and industry reporting on tariff impact

extractions.claim: PDD's overall sales & marketing spend held flat in Q3 2025 despite ad cut in US, suggesting reallocation to merchant subsidies and non-US markets
extractions.evidence: Q3 2025 S&M: RMB 30.32B vs RMB 30.48B prior year (-0.5% YoY). Yet US ad spend collapsed. This means either: (a) European ad spend increased proportionally, or (b) merchant subsidy spending (counted in S&M) increased significantly, or (c) both. The RMB 100B merchant support program announced in 2025 confirms the subsidy channel.

verification.verifier_notes: S&M figure from Q3 2025 earnings. The reallocation interpretation is analyst inference based on ad library data + S&M flat trajectory.
